{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Aetheric occurrence
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nezarin]] experiences an unexplained [[Aetheric occurrence]] every thousand years or so.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
